GeneKeepR: A Colony Manager's Tutorial (retired)

Source: vignettes/ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd
ColonyManagerTutorial.Rmd

This tutorial has been retired (2026-07-17). Its content – purpose, approach, and a tab-by-tab walkthrough – has been ported, modernized, and re-verified against the current modular application into the public article “nprcgenekeepr: Purpose, Approach, and a Colony Manager’s Guide to Practice”, part of the package’s online documentation at https://rmsharp.github.io/nprcgenekeepr/.

This file was already excluded from the built package (.Rbuildignore) and was never part of the public pkgdown site; it is kept only as a historical record and is not maintained further. See docs/planning/document2-colony-manager-guide-plan.md §12 decision 3 and CHANGELOG.md’s Session 398 entry for the retirement decision.

Developed by Michael Raboin, Terry Therneau, Amanda Vinson, R. Mark Sharp, Matthew Schultz, Southwest National Primate Research Center NIH grant P51 RR13986, Oregon National Primate Research Center grant P51 OD011092.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
